title: SkillsFuture Mid-Career Enhanced Subsidy
text:
SkillsFuture Mid-Career Enhanced Subsidy - SupportGoWhere
SkillsFuture Mid-Career Enhanced Subsidy
Share link
Provides up to 90% subsidy on course fees for Singapore Citizens aged 40 and above.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Up to 90% subsidy on course fees for Singapore Citizens aged 40 and above
At least 90% subsidy on programme costs for MOE-subsidised courses at institutions like Autonomous Universities, Polytechnics, and ITE
Collapse all sections
About this support

Up to 90% subsidy on course fees for courses offered by SkillsFuture Singapore (SSG)-appointed Continuing Education and Training (CET) Centres

At least 90% subsidy on programme costs for Ministry of Education (MOE)-subsidised full-time and part-time courses at institutions like Autonomous Universities, Polytechnics, and the Institute of Technical Education

For certifiable-skills training courses, up to 70% subsidy on course fees

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen

Aged 40 and above

Qualifies for the Ministry of Education (MOE)/SkillsFuture Singapore (SSG) base course fee subsidy

How to apply?

Enrol in a course that is supported by SkillsFuture Singapore (SSG) or offered by one of the following institutions:

Autonomous Universities (AU):

National University of Singapore (NUS)

Nanyang Technological University (NTU)

Singapore Management University (SMU)

Singapore University of Technology and Design (SUTD)

Singapore Institute of Technology (SIT)

Singapore University of Social Sciences (SUSS)

Polytechnics

Institute of Technical Education (ITE)

LASALLE College of the Arts and Nanyang Academy of Fine Arts (NAFA)

National Institute of Early Childhood Development (NIEC)

Ensure the course is eligible for MOE/SSG base course fee subsidy

The enhanced subsidy will be applied automatically at the point of enrolment if you are eligible

Where can I find help?

View more details

SkillsFuture Hotline: 6785 5785

Call Centre Operating Hours: 
Mondays to Fridays
8.30 am to 5.30 pm 
Closed on Sat, Sun & Public Holidays

Submit an enquiry

SkillsFuture Singapore  1 Paya Lebar Link,  #08-08, Paya Lebar Quarter 2  Singapore 408533



Scheme last updated 06 Nov 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
